title: Allegro MicroSystems Q3 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Allegro MicroSystems reported Q3 2024 results that exceeded expectations. The company delivered sales of $255 million, representing 2% year-over-year growth. Net income reached $62 million, translating to earnings per share of $0.32, surpassing analyst estimates of $0.29. Gross margin stood at 54.6%, while operating margin reached 27.2%. The company generated $77 million in operating cash flow and $42 million in free cash flow during the quarter. Management emphasized strong momentum in strategic growth areas with sales up approximately 20% year-over-year to $150 million or 59% of total sales. Automotive sales demonstrated particular strength, growing 18% year-over-year to $195 million and representing 76% of total sales. E-mobility sales surged 45% annually, comprising 54% of automotive revenue. The company reported record design win activity with over $1 billion in design wins expected for fiscal year 2024. Allegro successfully integrated its Crocus acquisition, combining magnetic sensor technologies under the ExtremeSense brand. Management expects Q4 sales between $230-$240 million, projecting full-year 2024 automotive growth in the high teens.
